items.claim: Lesbiani possesses a high-level submission grappling game.
items.quote: I'm looking at a really good submission grappling game for for Lebani

items.claim: Lesbiani's triangle choke from his back is among the best in mixed martial arts.
items.quote: He's hit a triangle or two off of his back that are some of the best I've ever seen in mixed martial arts.

items.claim: Co has a rangy striking style with open hands and his head positioned back.
items.quote: Co is rangy as hell. I like the open hands and his head's way back here

items.claim: The level of competition in California is superior to the level of competition in South Korea.
items.quote: I just feel like the competition is just better out here in California than it is in South Korea.

items.claim: Austin Bashi lacks a high-caliber win in the UFC.
items.quote: Bashie's grappling is good, but he doesn't have like a high caliber UFC win.

items.claim: Jose Delgado demonstrated poor defensive wrestling mechanics against Andre Phy.
items.quote: Jose Delgado actually showed like malfunction level wrestling.

items.claim: The big cage provides a tactical advantage for Jose Delgado's striking style.
items.quote: Big cage is good for Delgato.
